meta._repo_note: Flow template. Export the real Blueprint from Make after connecting modules.
meta.scenario_name: Daily Top 10 — Top Opportunities → Google Sheets
meta.trigger_schedule: 07:00 daily (after match/score jobs; set timezone in Make)

prerequisite: Matches table + Top Opportunities view (Score > 80, last 24h)

google_sheet.write_mode: Clear data rows then append 10 rows OR update range A2:D11

columns_detail.Opportunity_Pair: Supply Display Title + Demand Display Title (from Classified lookups)
columns_detail.Links: Airtable record URLs and/or listing URLs from Raw_Data
columns_detail.Action_Next: Static template e.g. Review in Airtable + Slack hint

flow.action: View Top Opportunities OR equivalent filter
Unique (Matched_Supply id, Matched_Demand id); keep best score
Lookup Classified titles for pair labels
Clear rows 2+ or Update range; write 10 rows
Optional: email sheet link; post summary to channel

empty_state: If 0 matches: optional single row or Slack message No opportunities today
